name: Bacon-Stuffed Cherry Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup finely chopped green onion tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the bacon and fry until crisp. Drain on paper towels to remove excess fat.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the bacon, green onion tops, and mayonnaise.
3. Remove the stems from the cherry tomatoes and place them stem-side down on a cutting board.
4. Cut a thin slice off the top of each tomato using a small spoon.
5. Scoop out the pulp with the spoon, leaving a cavity in each tomato.
6. Invert the tomatoes back onto the paper towels to drain any excess liquid.
7. Fill each tomato with the bacon mixture and place on a platter.
8. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight before serving. This recipe makes 24 appetizers.
9. Placing the tomatoes stem-side down prevents them from rolling around on your platter.
